title: Institute's Innovation Council (IIC's)
content: Institute's Innovation Council (IIC's) Received 3.0 star rating for Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) activities prescribed by Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education in the year 2021-22 Received 3.5 star rating for Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) activities prescribed by Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education in the year 2020-21 Received 2.5 star rating for Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) activities prescribed by Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education in the year 2019-20 Received 2.0 star rating for Institution's Innovation Council (IIC) activities prescribed by Innovation Cell, Ministry of Education in the year 2018-19
